nasb.text: Remember the word which You commanded Your servant Moses, saying, ‘If you are unfaithful I will scatter you among the peoples;

esv.text: Remember the word that you commanded your servant Moses, saying, ‘If you are unfaithful, I will scatter you among the peoples,

cnv.text: 求你記念你吩咐你僕人摩西的話，說：‘你們若是不忠，我就把你們分散在萬民中。

ccb.text: 求你顾念你对你仆人摩西所说的话，‘如果你们不忠，我必把你们驱散到列邦中。
